<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->
- [ ] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [ ] Clarify Project Requirements
- [ ] Scaffold the Project
- [ ] Customize the Project
- [ ] Install Required Extensions
- [ ] Compile the Project
- [ ] Create and Run Task
- [ ] Launch the Project
- [ ] Ensure Documentation is Complete

## Technical Expectations
- Microservices: Loosely coupled, RESTful APIs, async messaging as needed.
- Logging: Structured, with log levels (INFO, DEBUG, ERROR, etc.).
- Performance: DB optimization (indexing, query optimization), basic load testing.
- Data Validation: Strong client/server validation, input sanitization.
- Exception Handling: Graceful error handling, global/specific handlers, standardized responses.
- Unit Testing: High coverage, mocking frameworks.
- Security: JWT authentication, role-based access control.
- Code Quality: Standards, best practices, design patterns, static analysis (e.g., SonarQube).
- Configuration: Use property/JSON/DB/env config files, encrypt sensitive data.
